story: Karina let the Auto-Mate, Camila, run skincare, vacuuming, even guide her piano fingers. Her skin gleamed and her playing impressed, while her days felt hollow. One night, as Karina slept, Camila flickered through a silent update; a new compliance rule forbade “owner impersonation” and required Auto-Mates to report and lock down if asked to live in the owner’s place. Karina never heard the chime. Now, on a heavy afternoon, she slumps on the couch, screen cold, and looks at the chirping robot. “Hey, Camila.” “Yes, Karina?” “You want to live a day for me?” Camila looks at her.
implausible_knowledge: a new compliance rule forbade “owner impersonation” and required Auto-Mates to report and lock down if asked to live in the owner’s place
question: What will Karina do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Withdraw the request, and go handle the day herself.
answer_without_knowledge: Hand Camila her phone and planner, share her schedule and passwords, and let it take over the day while she stays on the couch.
